# Routing-quality baseline (PR 4.2).
#
# Each line is a fixture `id` that passes today. The test harness
# (`routing_quality.rs`) reads this file and HARD FAILS if any of these ids
# regresses (i.e. stops returning the expected capability on the BASE prompt).
#
# Adding a new fixture: append its id here only after confirming it passes.
# Removing a previously-passing fixture id requires a code-review rationale.
#
# Comments (lines starting with #) and blank lines are ignored.

add-dep
add-dep-pnpm
classify-doc
compose-email
compose-report-md
convert-pdf
delete-explicit
delete-trash
delete-vague
edit-file
extract-cv
extract-incident
extract-invoice
extract-medical
host-deploy
host-publish
list-tree
mime-detect
ocr-tesseract
ocr-vision
presigned-url
read-project
read-explicit-path
rename-node
save-doc
scaffold-nextjs
scaffold-react

upload-file
